title: Single-operator outcomes of catheter ablation for paroxysmal atrial fibrillation: a 15-year consecutive series
summary: Long-term freedom from AF after first ablation in a high-volume UK centre, with a published complication rate below 1%.

title: Left atrial appendage occlusion in patients with atrial fibrillation and contraindications to anticoagulation
summary: Real-world outcomes from a regional LAAO programme serving 2.8 million people across the North West of England.

title: Pulsed field versus radiofrequency ablation for paroxysmal atrial fibrillation: a multicentre randomised comparison
journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
summary: Head-to-head trial reporting comparable efficacy between PFA and RFA, with operator experience as a key determinant of safety.

title: Catheter ablation of atrial fibrillation: where volume, technology and patient selection intersect
summary: Editorial review of how centre and operator volume shape outcomes, regardless of whether heat or pulsed-field energy is used.

title: Complication rates in high-volume AF ablation centres: a national registry analysis
summary: Registry data confirming that procedural volume is the strongest modifiable predictor of major complications in AF ablation.

title: 2024 ESC Guidelines for the management of atrial fibrillation: ablation and stroke prevention
summary: Updated European consensus on when to ablate, how to select energy modality, and LAAO in patients who cannot take anticoagulants.

title: Durability of pulmonary vein isolation with contact-force sensing in persistent atrial fibrillation
summary: Late reconnection rates and predictors of recurrence after second-generation contact-force ablation in persistent AF.

title: Stroke prevention beyond anticoagulation: the evolving role of left atrial appendage closure
summary: Narrative review of patient selection, device options and long-term outcomes for LAAO in non-valvular AF.

title: Cryoballoon versus radiofrequency ablation for first-line treatment of paroxysmal AF: five-year follow-up
summary: Extended follow-up from a pragmatic trial comparing first-line cryoablation and RF in treatment-naive paroxysmal AF patients.
